values.description: Base URL of the backend server. Change to your Fly.io URL (e.g. https://github-issue-notifier.fly.dev) for production.
Email address that will receive issue notifications. Used in PUT /api/config.
GitHub repository to watch in owner/repo format.
Issue label to watch for (case-insensitive match).
GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT). Optional but increases rate limit from 60 to 5000 req/hr. Generate at github.com/settings/tokens.
Notification window start time in HH:MM (24-hour). Set to empty string to disable the window filter. Overnight windows are supported (e.g. 22:00 start with 06:00 end).
Notification window end time in HH:MM (24-hour). Set to empty string to disable the window filter.
IANA timezone for the notification window (e.g. UTC, Asia/Kolkata, America/New_York, Europe/London). The start/end times are interpreted in this timezone.
CUID of a NotificationRecord. Auto-populated by the 'List Notifications' request test script. Or set manually from a GET /api/notifications response.
